fields.name: location_ping_id
fields.title: ID referencing vehicle_locations.location_ping_id
fields.description: Identifies the vehicle location where the device event occurred

fields.name: trip_id_performed
fields.title: ID referencing trips_performed.trip_id_performed
fields.description: Identifies the trip performed. If trips_performed table is used, this must be populated in order to link to it.

fields.name: trip_stop_sequence
fields.title: Positive integer referencing stop_visits.trip_stop_sequence
fields.description: The actual order of stops visited within a performed trip. The values must start at 1 and must be consecutive along the trip. Required for vehicle-based events; optional for station-based or mobile device events not associated with a trip.

fields.name: scheduled_stop_sequence
fields.title: positive integer referencing GTFS stop_times.stop_sequence
fields.description: Scheduled order of stops for a particular trip. The values must increase along the trip but do not need to be consecutive. References GTFS

fields.name: event_type
fields.description: Indicates the type of event recorded. Use passenger_boarded/passenger_alighted for vehicle boarding/alighting events. Use passenger_entry/passenger_exit for station-based events like fare gate passages.

fields.name: vehicle_id
fields.title: ID referencing vehicles.vehicle_id
fields.description: Identifies a vehicle. Required for vehicle-mounted device events; optional for station-based or mobile device events.

fields.name: device_id
fields.title: ID referencing devices.device_id
fields.description: Identifies the device that recorded the event. Links to the devices table to determine device type (vehicle-mounted, station-based, or mobile).

fields.name: employee_id
fields.title: Employee ID
fields.description: Identifies the employee operating a handheld device, such as a fare inspector or conductor with a mobile validator.

fields.name: stop_id
fields.title: ID referencing GTFS stops.stop_id
fields.description: Identifies the stop the vehicle is serving. References GTFS

fields.name: latitude
fields.title: Latitude
fields.description: Degrees North, in the WGS-84 coordinate system. Used for mobile device events not at a fixed location. References GTFS-Realtime.

fields.name: longitude
fields.title: Longitude
fields.description: Degrees East, in the WGS-84 coordinate system. Used for mobile device events not at a fixed location. References GTFS-Realtime.

fields.name: pattern_id
fields.title: unique identifier for the route-pattern
fields.description: Identifies the unique stop-path for a trip, may be distinct from GTFS shapes.shape_id

fields.name: event_count
fields.title: Event count
fields.description: Count for this event, e.g., 3 for a Passenger Boarding event with 3 boardings, default is  `1`

name: device_events.schema.json
description: Timestamped device-recorded events, including boardings, alightings, fare gate passages, and mobile validator events.
